A.reason: Event where before people couldn't see it and didn't know it would happen, after can see it — renders unexpected becoming-visible sharply.

B.missing: no CAN modal on seeing (visibility) and no unexpectedness component; just not-seen-then-seen
B.reason: Skeleton of change in seeing but lacks the visibility (CAN SEE) and unexpectedness that mark apparition.

C.reason: Before couldn't see and weren't thinking of it, after can see — captures becoming-visible plus surprise.
